message:
Add coroutine reschedule points to json (#5812)

## Summary

- **Add `co_reschedule_on_current_executor` points**: Inserts explicit
reschedule
points in the read and write worker coroutine loops. Without these, a
worker
that processes a large batch can monopolize its executor thread and
starve other
coroutines. The reschedule points give the executor a chance to
interleave other
  ready tasks, improving throughput and latency fairness under load.

- **Add slow-task logging in `exec.cpp`**: Logs via `TENZIR_VERBOSE`
when a single
`add()` invocation exceeds 1 second of wall time, reporting wall/CPU
time and
cumulative stats to help spot operators that block the executor for too
long.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
